title: Playwright overview
content: Playwright is an end-to-end testing framework that can automate Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit. It also provides API testing capabilities.

title: Docker overview
content: Docker packages applications and their dependencies into containers so they can run consistently across environments.

title: GitHub Actions overview
content: GitHub Actions is a CI/CD platform that can run workflows for building, testing, and deploying software directly from a GitHub repository.
